## [00:00 - 03:00]

Hi, this is Don Crosby with a video about price anchoring and price. At this point in the webinar, we've gone through the benefits, the second level benefits and the features. So price anchoring is the process of creating a foundational price against which your price will be perceived as being a huge discount versus what they would have to pay to get this elsewhere. So if you think about it, $2,000, which is the cost of a lot of programs out there, is a lot of money unless you feel like you're getting a great value for that amount. And price anchoring does that.
